conventions: ZERO hardcoded credentials — use env vars, secret managers, or .env (gitignored)
Run HOLY survey at Tier 1 before every commit
Rotate any exposed credential immediately upon detection
Max function parameters: 5 (use dataclass/dict for more)
All public functions and classes must have docstrings (PEP 257)
No empty functions — implement or delete
TODO/FIXME comments must have an issue number or be resolved within 7 days
Shell scripts: kebab-case or snake_case naming
No trailing whitespace (configure editor: trim_trailing_whitespace = true)
Every Python file >20 lines has a module docstring
Every script has a shebang line and --help flag
